text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash still hasn't arrived for our training
session. Just when I start to think she might not
come at all...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm so very sorry! I did not mean to be an
hour and thirty-four minutes late.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well, I ate off campus today because the
cafeteria is closed...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But my order took so long to come out, I almost
canceled it altogether.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When it arrived, I ate as quickly as I could and
tried to race back here, but I had to stop because
my stomach was hurting too badly...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But it does not excuse my tardiness. I shall reduce
my break time to compensate for every minute of
time lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell she's sincerely sorry for being late, so I
let her off with a light warning.
